response.justification: Strong individual-contributor engineer with 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience, testing/TDD advocacy, and developer-tooling side projects (test runners, CI setup, MCP code generators). However, the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in a developer-tools/build-systems org. The resume shows no direct people-management experience, no mobile-platform-ecosystem build/test infrastructure work at scale, and 'Staff' titles that appear to be IC roles rather than line-management positions.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background (TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java) with strong testing and TDD culture
Demonstrated developer-tooling work: custom test runner (Trial), assertions library, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators
Track record of teaching, workshops, and knowledge sharing — useful for team development
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience in any listed role
Limited mobile-platform-ecosystem experience at scale (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015–2016 only)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning mid-term technical roadmaps for a productivity org
